title: carum multiflorum subsp. strictum
intro: Carum multiflorum subsp. strictum, also known as Wild Caraway, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and carminative properties. The health benefits of Wild Caraway include relieving coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as soothing digestive issues such as flatulence and indigestion. Wild Caraway can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
